title: Modern AE2 Additions
description: Ports some features of NAE2 to modern AE2
body:
Small mod that adds in whatever I or others want in AE2. ~~So far that's just been features from NAE2, but I hope to come up with other stuff soon!~~ Faulty Memory Card and Semi-Vibrant Glass are (hopefully) completely unique creations!

Checkout the wiki for more detailed explanations of everything
# Features
**Pattern P2P Tunnel** - Allows one pattern provider to provide to multiple machines at once by connecting it to the input of the tunnel. Additionally the output tunnel links back to the pattern provider to allow Molecular Assemblers to work easily.

**EU P2P Tunnel** - Transfers EU from GregTech-Modern. Taxes the EU at the same rate other P2P tunnel transfers are taxed.

**Dense Co-Processing Units** - Crafting CPU Co-Processing Units that provide more than 1 thread. One for each storage component giving as many threads as there are kilobytes in the component (so 4, 16, 64, 256 threads respectively.

**Multi P2P Tunnels** - P2P Tunnels with multiple inputs, not much else really. Due to how its implemented, they're seperate parts and won't automatically work with custom P2Ps added by other mods (though AE2's P2Ps have them added by me)

**Faulty Memory Card** - A tool that helps out with repetetive memory card tasks. Currently it can help with mass pasting of device configs and setting up storage busses/level emitters to have incrementing/decrementing priorities/amounts (mainly for GT assembly lines, but there's other uses).

**Semi-Vibrant Glass** - Vibrant Glass that instead of having the particles randomly float in it, imitates a cloud chamber with them. Also comes with a public API for any other mod to use for easy cloud chamber effects.
